basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Part Time Coaches, Gym Instructor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.post_name: Part Time Coaches, Gym Instructor, Fitness Trainer & Yoga Instructor
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Part Time Coaches, Gym Instructor, Fitness Trainer & Yoga Instructor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitmandi.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Mandi Part Time Coaches, Gym Instructor, Fitness Trainer & Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 50 years Relaxation in age and qualification may be granted to candidates who have represented National / Senior National level, or possess other notable achievements or qualifications in sports coaching.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Physical Education, Certificate Course in Coaching from a recognised institution, NIS Diploma in the relevant sport, Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Physical Education or equivalent coaching certification, Level-1 Coaching Course, Bachelor's or Master's Degree in yoga or Diploma in Yoga with 3 years experience, Bachelor's or Master's Degree in any discipline or Diploma / Certificate in Fitness Training / Gym Training, Certified Gym Trainer (K11, Gold's Gym, NSCA, ACSM etc.)
qualification.details: Sports Coaches (Athletics, Aquatics/Swimming, Basketball, Football, Lawn Tennis, Volleyball, Weightlifting): Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Physical Education OR Certificate Course in Coaching from a recognised institution OR NIS Diploma in the relevant sport. Representation at State / University / National level preferred. Sports Coaches (Squash): Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Physical Education or equivalent coaching certification. Representation at State/University/National level OR Level-1 Coaching Course. Yoga Instructor: Bachelor's or Master's Degree in yoga, or any higher qualification from a recognised institution, or Diploma in Yoga from a recognised institution with at least three years of relevant experience in yoga. Knowledge of traditional yoga practices, pranayama, meditation, and relaxation techniques. Gym Instructor & Fitness Trainer: Bachelor's or Master's Degree in any discipline or Diploma / Certificate in Fitness Training / Gym Training from a recognised institute. Certified Gym Trainer (from recognised bodies such as K11, Gold's Gym, NSCA, ACSM, etc.). Preferably a Certified Gym Instructor. A minimum of 3 years of work experience is required. Knowledge of strength training, cardio training, and functional fitness.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Mandi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Mandi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Sports Coaches (Athletics, Aquatics/Swimming, Basketball, Football, Lawn Tennis, Volleyball, Weightlifting)

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Sports Coaches (Athletics, Aquatics/Swimming, Basketball, Football, Lawn Tennis, Volleyball, Weightlifting): Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Physical Education OR Certificate Course in Coaching from a recognised institution OR NIS Diploma in the relevant sport. Representation at State / University / National level preferred. Sports Coaches (Squash): Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Physical Education or equivalent coaching certification. Representation at State/University/National level OR Level-1 Coaching Course. Yoga Instructor: Bachelor's or Master's Degree in yoga, or any higher qualification from a recognised institution, or Diploma in Yoga from a recognised institution with at least three years of relevant experience in yoga. Knowledge of traditional yoga practices, pranayama, meditation, and relaxation techniques. Gym Instructor & Fitness Trainer: Bachelor's or Master's Degree in any discipline or Diploma / Certificate in Fitness Training / Gym Training from a recognised institute. Certified Gym Trainer (from recognised bodies such as K11, Gold's Gym, NSCA, ACSM, etc.). Preferably a Certified Gym Instructor. A minimum of 3 years of work experience is required. Knowledge of strength training, cardio training, and functional fitness.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 50 years Relaxation in age and qualification may be granted to candidates who have represented National / Senior National level, or possess other notable achievements or qualifications in sports coaching.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Mandi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The selection process is scheduled for 20 July 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the posts of Part Time Coaches, Gym Instructor, Fitness Trainer, and Yoga Instructor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Sports Coaches posts?
faq.answer: For Sports Coaches, a Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Physical Education, or a Certificate Course in Coaching, or an NIS Diploma in the relevant sport is required. Representation at State/University/National level is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates is between 25 years (minimum) and 50 years (maximum). Age relaxation may be provided for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Part Time Coach and Instructor posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 28000 to Rs. 30000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be a Walk-in Selection Process. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Indian Institute of Technology Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, Mandi - 175075.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a Diploma in Fitness Training apply for the Gym Instructor & Fitness Trainer post?
faq.answer: Yes, a Diploma or Certificate in Fitness Training / Gym Training from a recognised institute is a valid qualification for the Gym Instructor & Fitness Trainer post, along with being a Certified Gym Trainer.
